display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
J0
Input DNG

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
1. CLI ingress / validation
1) core.main distinguishes management vs conversion
2) run validates OS, path, dependencies, EXIF

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
2. Linear base extraction + RAW-WB normalization
1) neutral rawpy.postprocess -> RGB uint16
2) / sensor dynamic range -> RGB float32
3) apply normalized WB gains (GREEN/MAX/MIN/MEAN)
Output: J1 camera-linear RGB float32

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
J1
camera-linear RGB float32
WB applied

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
3/A Auto-brightness disabled
pass-through

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
3/B Auto-brightness enabled
1) BT.709 luminance
2) key selection / override
3) Reinhard luminance mapping
4) rescale RGB by luminance ratio
5) optional overflow-only desaturation

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
J2
camera-linear RGB float32
post-AB

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
4/A Auto-WB disabled
pass-through

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
4/B-F Auto-WB enabled
1) estimate a single gain vector
2) modes: Simple / GrayworldWB / IA / ColorConstancy / TTL
3) apply gains to the original camera-linear image

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
J3
camera-linear RGB float32
post-AWB

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
5/A auto ev_zero+delta
1) ev_best / ev_ettr / ev_detail
2) ev_zero = min(...)
3) iterative ev_delta

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
5/B auto ev_zero only
1) ev_best / ev_ettr / ev_detail
2) ev_zero = min(...)
3) static ev_delta

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
5/C auto ev_delta only
1) static ev_zero
2) iterative ev_delta
3) OpenCV-Tonemap: fixed 0.1 EV

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
5/D static
1) static ev_zero
2) static ev_delta

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
6/A-B Bracket synthesis
1) 2^(ev_zero-delta), 2^ev_zero, 2^(ev_zero+ev_delta)
2) EV scaling on the base image
3) clip &[0,1&] per bracket
4) if OpenCV-Tonemap: ev_zero only, side brackets=None

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
J4
Bracket contract
camera-linear RGB float32 &[0,1&]

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
7/A Luminance-HDR
1) bracket -> TIFF32
2) external luminance-hdr-cli merge+TMO
3) TIFF32 -> RGB float normalized

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
7/B OpenCV-Merge Debevec
1) EXIF exposure times
2) float32 radiance merge
3) optional simple tonemap
4) normalize &[0,1&]
5) merge gamma

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
7/C OpenCV-Merge Robertson
1) EXIF exposure times
2) float32 radiance merge
3) optional simple tonemap
4) normalize &[0,1&]
5) merge gamma

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
7/D OpenCV-Merge Mertens
1) merge gamma on each bracket
2) MergeMertens
3) *255 bridge
4) optional simple tonemap
5) normalize &[0,1&]

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
7/E OpenCV-Tonemap Drago
1) use ev_zero only
2) Drago tonemap (gamma_inv)
3) merge gamma no-clip

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
7/F OpenCV-Tonemap Reinhard
1) use ev_zero only
2) Reinhard tonemap (gamma_inv)
3) merge gamma no-clip

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
7/G OpenCV-Tonemap Mantiuk
1) use ev_zero only
2) Mantiuk tonemap (gamma_inv)
3) merge gamma no-clip

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
7/H HDR-Plus
1) reorder (ev_zero, ev_minus, ev_plus)
2) scalar proxy
3) hierarchical alignment
4) box_down2
5) temporal merge
6) spatial blend
7) merge gamma

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
J5
display-referred RGB float32
backend output

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
8. Postprocess entry adaptation
1) float backend outputs pass-through
2) non-float payloads only -> normalize to RGB float32

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
J6
display-referred RGB float32
postprocess entry

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
9/A-B Static postprocess
1) 9/A numeric: gamma -> brightness -> contrast -> saturation
2) 9/B auto: LUT auto-gamma -> brightness -> contrast -> saturation
3) only non-neutral substages execute

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
J7
display-referred RGB float32
post-static

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
10/A-G Auto-levels
10/A disabled: pass-through
10/B enabled no HR
10/C-G enabled + HR method {Luminance Recovery | CIELab Blending | Blend | Color Propagation | Inpaint Opposed}
+ optional gamut clip

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
J8
display-referred RGB float32
post-auto-levels

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
11/A-B Auto-adjust
11/A disabled: pass-through
11/B enabled: blur -> level -> CLAHE-luma -> sigmoid -> HSL vibrance -> high-pass overlay

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
J9
display-referred RGB float32
post-auto-adjust

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
12. Final save prep + encode
1) clip &[0,1&]
2) quantize RGB uint8
3) Pillow JPEG save
4) EXIF thumbnail refresh if present

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
J12
Output JPG
